ppeo:hasName.rdfs:label: Variable name*
ppeo:hasName.rdfs:comment: Human-readable name of the observed variable (required).

ppeo:hasDescription.rdfs:label: Variable description
ppeo:hasDescription.rdfs:comment: Narrative description of what is measured.

ppeo:hasTrait.rdfs:label: Trait
ppeo:hasTrait.rdfs:comment: Biological/physical trait the variable represents (e.g., plant height).

ppeo:hasMethod.rdfs:label: Method
ppeo:hasMethod.rdfs:comment: How the variable is measured or derived (protocol, algorithm).

ppeo:hasUnit.rdfs:label: Unit
ppeo:hasUnit.rdfs:comment: Measurement unit, if applicable (e.g., cm, °C, NDVI).

ppeo:hasDataType.rdfs:label: Data type
ppeo:hasDataType.rdfs:comment: Expected value type (e.g., integer, float, string, boolean).

ppeo:isPartOf.rdfs:label: Part of Observation Unit*
ppeo:isPartOf.rdfs:comment: Link to the parent Observation Unit by @id. Variables can be part of multiple units.

sosa:isObservedBy.rdfs:label: Observed by Sensor
sosa:isObservedBy.rdfs:comment: Bridge via SOSA: link the sensor(s) used to obtain/derive this variable.

ppeo:hasRelatedSynonym.rdfs:label: Synonym
ppeo:hasRelatedSynonym.rdfs:comment: Observed Variable corresponds conceptually to a SOSA ObservableProperty.
